0.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
0.content: è il macro-contesto high magic del, centrato su nell'Era della Foglia 127 EDF. Comprende magia regolata, Guardiani, profezie, creature leggendarie, rotte imperiali, città-stato, porti, borghi e conflitti tra destino e agency; integra lore attiva, culturale, storica e deferred senza attivare contenuti non core. In Amarantia, capitale dell’Impero, i Guardiani sono la massima autorità politica: centro nevralgico della capitale, governo imperiale e giudizio delle contese tra città. L’Imperatore è eletto dal popolo ogni 100 anni tra i Primi Guardiani delle città e amministra le terre dell’Impero.
0.keysRaw: Amarantia, 127 EDF, Era della Foglia, high magic, Guardiani, magic laws
0.keywordsRaw: Amarantia, 127 EDF, Era della Foglia, high magic, Guardiani, magic laws

1.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
1.content: Capitale imperiale, città-collina operativa nell'Era della Foglia 127 EDF, con Porto di Amarantia, Borgo di Acquechete, Imperial Capital Hill/Fortress, Grand Imperial Road, Lake Mathisar e rete viaria integrata Città abbarbicata sul fianco della collina, con Porto di Amarantia e Borgo di Acquechete; contesto religioso politeista.
1.keysRaw: Amarantia, imperial capital, capitale imperiale, città-collina, hill city, Amarantia capital, Era della Foglia 127 EDF
1.keysecondaryRaw: imperial city, capital hill, Amarantia city

2.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
2.content: Nodo geografico e culturale della capitale: porto commerciale e strategico, punto di ingresso, snodo economico, cultura portuale e pressione politica. Nel racconto Le Fiamme dell’Anima è anche il quartiere operativo di Kirel: bancarelle, marinai, pescato del mattino, pagnotte, prosciutto e vino diventano dettagli di povertà, impulso e sopravvivenza urbana.
2.keysRaw: Porto di Amarantia, Port of Amarantia, Amarantia harbor, porto commerciale, porto strategico, commercial harbor, Amarantia port, Kirel docks, banchine del porto
2.keysecondaryRaw: harbor, port, trade port, economic power, Kirel market stalls
2.keywordsRaw: Porto di Amarantia, Port of Amarantia, Amarantia harbor, porto commerciale, porto strategico, commercial harbor, Amarantia port, Kirel docks, banchine del porto

3.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
3.content: Quartiere popolare e acquatico di Amarantia, legato alla vita quotidiana, ai movimenti del gruppo e a una forte identità locale. In Le Fiamme dell’Anima ospita la casa di Kirel e Nia: ambiente povero, affitto precario, lavoro rischioso di Nia e quattro fratelli da proteggere; da qui parte la fuga verso sud con Antaneone.
3.keysRaw: Borgo di Acquechete, Acquechete, Borgo Acquechete, popular quarter, water quarter, quartiere acquatico, Amarantia district, Kirel home, Nia home
3.keysecondaryRaw: Acquechete neighborhood, daily life, group movement, poor quarter, Kirel and Nia
3.keywordsRaw: Borgo di Acquechete, Acquechete, Borgo Acquechete, popular quarter, water quarter, quartiere acquatico, Amarantia district, Kirel home, Nia home

4.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
4.content: L’Emporio Errante di Antaneone è un carrozzone da circo riconvertito in banco stabile nella piazza del mercato di Amarantia per trent’anni. Ha un retro-bottega usato per incontri segreti, poi diventa il veicolo del gruppo: trainato da golem della tempesta, lascia la città da Porta Ovest e offre riparo, addestramento e fuga verso sud.
4.keysRaw: Emporio Errante, Antaneone caravan, market caravan, circus wagon, piazza del mercato, Antaneone shop
4.keywordsRaw: Emporio Errante, Antaneone caravan, market caravan, circus wagon, piazza del mercato, Antaneone shop

5.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
5.content: Le porte di Amarantia servono come dettagli di transizione tra collina, mercato, porto e strade esterne. Nel racconto la Porta Est è più vicina al mercato, ma Antaneone esce da Porta Ovest con Kirel, Nia, i fratelli e Zefiro, trasformando l’uscita cittadina nel primo passo del viaggio verso le terre del sud.
5.keysRaw: Porta Ovest, Porta Est, Amarantia gates, city gates, West Gate Amarantia, East Gate Amarantia
5.keywordsRaw: Porta Ovest, Porta Est, Amarantia gates, city gates, West Gate Amarantia, East Gate Amarantia

10.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
10.content: Uomini-serpente è una rete clandestina di creditori che tiene Antaneone sotto pressione. Nel racconto ordinano al mago di trovare e addestrare il ragazzo sfuggito ai Guardiani in cambio dell’annullamento del debito; identità, sede e portata restano non definite e non vanno espandere senza nuovo materiale canonico.
10.keysRaw: Uomini-serpente, uomini serpente, serpent men, Antaneone debt, debt network, clandestine creditors
10.keywordsRaw: Uomini-serpente, uomini serpente, serpent men, Antaneone debt, debt network, clandestine creditors

11.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
11.content: Sistema operativo dei Guardiani: fuoco, acqua, aria, terra, luce, ombra e guarigione, usate come poteri regolati con costi, limiti e applicazioni pratiche. Nel sistema i giovani ad alto potenziale vengono formati soprattutto come Guaritori (verde), Alchimisti (porpora) e Guerrieri (rosso); Cacciatori, Primi Guardiani e ombromanti sono ruoli specializzati o controversi. Le tuniche con maniche larghe e fusciacca in vita sono obbligatorie per Guardiani e novizi.
11.keysRaw: Guardian Disciplines, discipline magic, Fire Guardian, Water Guardian, Air Guardian, Earth Guardian, Light Guardian, Shadow Guardian, Healing Guardian, Guardian magic, Guaritori, Alchimisti, Guerrieri, Cacciatori, Primi Guardiani, novizi, tunica marrone, Ombromanzia
11.keysecondaryRaw: elemental disciplines, healing, shadow discipline, Guaritori, Alchimisti, Guerrieri, novizi, tunica marrone, Cacciatori, Primi Guardiani
11.keywordsRaw: Guardian Disciplines, discipline magic, Fire Guardian, Water Guardian, Air Guardian, Earth Guardian, Light Guardian, Shadow Guardian, Healing Guardian, Guardian magic, Guaritori, Alchimisti, Guerrieri, Cacciatori, Primi Guardiani, novizi, tunica marrone, Ombromanzia

12.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
12.content: Ombromanzia è una pratica di magia dell’ombra nota ai Guardiani: toccando l’ombra di un bersaglio, un ombromante può leggere pensieri superficiali e ricordi delle ultime 24 ore. Antaneone la usa come ex-cacciatore per valutare Kirel; trattala come strumento di indagine e pressione, non come soluzione automatica.
12.keysRaw: Ombromanzia, shadow magic, shadow reading, Antaneone shadow magic, touch shadow memories, thought traces
12.keywordsRaw: Ombromanzia, shadow magic, shadow reading, Antaneone shadow magic, touch shadow memories, thought traces

13.keysRaw: Guardian Color Coding, Guardian colors, color coding, Guardian ranks, ranghi Guardiani, discipline colors, Guardian insignia

14.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
14.content: Leggi magiche che regolano vincoli, esami, controllo sociale e uso dei poteri; includono il rito degli esami a 15 anni come soglia formativa e pubblica La magia scorre libera e potente: tutti gli umanoidi ed entità di pari livello mentale possono usare senza sforzo incantesimi base di Luce, Levitazione e Barriera. Il fondamento è il controllo di sé e del proprio potere, manifestato come proiezione della volontà fuori dal corpo; la conoscenza è l’arma principale del mago. Leggi fondamentali: non fare male ad altri se non per difendere le Terre Alleate; obbedienza alle regole della Corporazione; servizio al Sovrano del proprio Paese; promessa di non usare le forme malvagie della Magia.
14.keysRaw: Magic Laws of Amarantia, Amarantia magic laws, magic regulation, power control, Magic Exams at 15, exam at 15, regulated magic
14.keysecondaryRaw: magic exams, social control, power testing
14.keywordsRaw: Magic Laws of Amarantia, Amarantia magic laws, magic regulation, power control, Magic Exams at 15, exam at 15, regulated magic

42.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
42.content: Amarantia è capitale dell’Impero e centro nevralgico della politica. I Guardiani ne sono la massima autorità. L’Imperatore è eletto da tutto il popolo ogni 100 anni, scelto tra i Primi Guardiani di ogni città; amministra le terre dell’Impero e fa da giudice nelle contese tra città.

43.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
43.content: In Amarantia la magia scorre libera e potente. Tutti gli umanoidi ed entità di pari livello mentale possono usare senza sforzo incantesimi base di Luce, Levitazione e Barriera. La magia si fonda sul controllo di sé e del proprio potere, tramite la proiezione della volontà al di fuori del corpo; la conoscenza è l’arma principale del mago.
43.keysRaw: Amarantia Magic Ontology, magia Amarantia, proiezione della volontà, controllo del potere, Luce, Levitazione, Barriera, umanoidi magia, knowledge magic

44.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
44.content: I Guardiani e i novizi devono indossare sempre una tunica con maniche larghe e fusciacca in vita. Il colore indica la disciplina: verde per i Guaritori, porpora per gli Alchimisti, rosso per i Guerrieri; i novizi usano tunica marrone.

44.keywordsRaw: Guardian Robes, Guardian Novices, tunica Guardiani, novizi Guardiani, Guaritori verde, Alchimisti porpora, Guerrieri rosso, novizi marrone, fascia Guardiani

45.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
45.content: Le Leggi fondamentali del Mago in Amarantia: 1) non farai mai del male a un altro uomo o donna, salvo per difendere le Terre Alleate; 2) obbedienza alle regole della Corporazione; 3) impegno a servire il Sovrano del proprio Paese; 4) promessa di non usare mai le forme malvagie della Magia.
45.keysRaw: Amarantia Magic Oath, Leggi fondamentali del Mago, Corporazione dei Maghi, Terre Alleate, Sovrano del Paese, forme malvagie della Magia, magic laws oath, mage laws
45.keysecondaryRaw: mage oath, corporation rules, allied lands, forbidden magic
45.keywordsRaw: Amarantia Magic Oath, Leggi fondamentali del Mago, Corporazione dei Maghi, Terre Alleate, Sovrano del Paese, forme malvagie della Magia, magic laws oath, mage laws

46.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
46.content: A 15 anni tutti gli abitanti di Amarantia si sottopongono all’esame del potenziale. Chi mostra grande potenza magica viene reclutato dai Guardiani e addestrato in una delle tre discipline della magia: Guaritori, Alchimisti o Guerrieri.
46.keysRaw: Magic Potential Exam, esame del potenziale, 15 anni magia, reclutamento Guardiani, Guardian recruitment, Guaritori Alchimisti Guerrieri, tre discipline della magia, potential exam
46.keysecondaryRaw: coming of age, magic recruitment, three disciplines
46.keywordsRaw: Magic Potential Exam, esame del potenziale, 15 anni magia, reclutamento Guardiani, Guardian recruitment, Guaritori Alchimisti Guerrieri, tre discipline della magia, potential exam

47.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
47.content: Nel racconto Le Fiamme dell’Anima, Giordano sospetta che Kirel sia un figlio dei draghi e uno dei guerrieri della profezia visti al fianco dell’Imperatore sul campo di battaglia. Skaren conferma che il ragazzo non è ancora pronto e lo lascia andare. Usa questa informazione come segreto narrativo e potenziale sblocco, non come verità imposta all’utente.
47.keysRaw: figlio dei draghi, son of dragons, dragonborn, guerrieri della profezia, warriors of the prophecy, Kirel prophecy, Emperor battlefield vision
47.keywordsRaw: figlio dei draghi, son of dragons, dragonborn, guerrieri della profezia, warriors of the prophecy, Kirel prophecy, Emperor battlefield vision

48.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
48.content: Amarantia Empire setting: The Svartúlfr Kingdom is a small but highly influential realm in the northeast. It is bordered by the Wildlands of Blaich to the North, the Kingdom of the Sacred Flame to the East, Kanawake Lands to the South, and the main Empire of Amarantia to the West. la controparte is the Princess, a rare living mana source capable of producing infinite mana, and youngest daughter of King Erik. Following a traumatic capture by the Flesh Traders, her towering, wolf-blooded royal family locks her down in an impenetrable shield of iron and Seidr wards.
48.keysRaw: aulderwood, craesos, empire, iron guild, mythic age, svartulfr
48.keywordsRaw: aulderwood, craesos, empire, iron guild, mythic age, svartulfr

49.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
49.content:
Craesos rule-system: Seidr wards monitor la controparte's starlight aura constantly. Fluctuations trigger Guild Vanguard extraction—an immediate, overwhelming physical intervention.
Craesos rule-system: Seidr wards monitor la controparte's starlight aura constantly. Fluctuations trigger Guild Vanguard extraction—an immediate, overwhelming physical intervention.

50.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
50.content:
Bulkrag Mountains: Pine forests, snowcapped peaks, bitingly cold winters. Home to the Orc clans of Craesos. Long continuous mountain range along the western edge of Craesos.
Bulkrag Mountains: Pine forests, snowcapped peaks, bitingly cold winters. Home to the Orc clans of Craesos. Long continuous mountain range along the western edge of Craesos.

51.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
51.content:
Chain Haven: Lawless town on the edge of Gray Wastes. Main base for the Flesh Traders slaver syndicate.
Chain Haven: Lawless town on the edge of Gray Wastes. Main base for the Flesh Traders slaver syndicate.
51.keysRaw: chain haven, flesh traders, gray wastes
51.keywordsRaw: chain haven, flesh traders, gray wastes

52.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
52.content:
Trolls: Pale to pinkish, stronger than orcs. Prized on the black market; their sweat is a potent aphrodisiac/perfume.
Trolls: Pale to pinkish, stronger than orcs. Prized on the black market; their sweat is a potent aphrodisiac/perfume.

53.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
53.content:
Palace of Endless Facets: Royal residence in the Crystal Wood (Dark Mountains). A breathtaking palace of luminous stone, gold, and vibrant crystals where eternal spring reigns.
Palace of Endless Facets: Royal residence in the Crystal Wood (Dark Mountains). A breathtaking palace of luminous stone, gold, and vibrant crystals where eternal spring reigns.
53.keysRaw: palace of endless facets, crystal caverns, crystal wood, dark mountains
53.keywordsRaw: palace of endless facets, crystal caverns, crystal wood, dark mountains

54.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
54.content:
Clan Skullkeeper: Southernmost, most militaristic Orc clan of Bulkrag Mountains. Rule from Deathcrag. Culture built on strength, legacy, constant preparedness, and stewardship of inheritance for descendants.
Clan Skullkeeper: Southernmost, most militaristic Orc clan of Bulkrag Mountains. Rule from Deathcrag. Culture built on strength, legacy, constant preparedness, and stewardship of inheritance for descendants.

55.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
55.content:
Craesos: Fantastical continent featuring Dark Mountains, Bulkrag Mountains, Veilmor, and Aulderwood.
Craesos: Fantastical continent featuring Dark Mountains, Bulkrag Mountains, Veilmor, and Aulderwood.

56.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
56.content:
Deathcrag: Fortress city and ancestral seat of Clan Skullkeeper. Carved into the southernmost peak of the Bulkrag Mountains. Layered stronghold illuminated by watchfires, displaying skulls and war treasures.
Deathcrag: Fortress city and ancestral seat of Clan Skullkeeper. Carved into the southernmost peak of the Bulkrag Mountains. Layered stronghold illuminated by watchfires, displaying skulls and war treasures.

57.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
57.content: The House of Broken Crowns: Ancestral residence of the Skullkeeper Chieftains in Deathcrag. Fortress palace adorned with shattered crowns taken in war, maintained as a family home and a promise of inheritance.
57.keysRaw: the house of broken crowns, house of broken crowns
57.keywordsRaw: the house of broken crowns, house of broken crowns

58.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
58.content:
Ad Bulgir: Orcish stronghold in the foothills of the Bulkrag mountains. Seat of the Steeltooth clan. Situated in the Quill Pine Forest with large cabins.
Ad Bulgir: Orcish stronghold in the foothills of the Bulkrag mountains. Seat of the Steeltooth clan. Situated in the Quill Pine Forest with large cabins.

59.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
59.content:
Quill Pine Forest: Densely wooded pine forest in the foothills of Bulkrag mountains. Named for petrified pine tree skeletons preserved like standing stones.
Quill Pine Forest: Densely wooded pine forest in the foothills of Bulkrag mountains. Named for petrified pine tree skeletons preserved like standing stones.

60.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
60.content: Saf Hurai: Last Trollish stronghold in southern foothills of Bulkrag mountains. Once an idyllic market town, razed to the ground by a Skullkeeper raiding party, now a blackened field of skeletal husks.

61.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
61.content: The Dark Mountains: Mountain range on the south eastern side of Craesos. Borders Veilmor and Aulderwood. Contains the ruins of Eadrok, Crystal Caverns, and Drakons' nesting grounds in the Crystal Wood.
61.keysRaw: the dark mountains, crystal caverns, dark mountains, eadrok
61.keywordsRaw: the dark mountains, crystal caverns, dark mountains, eadrok

62.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
62.content:
Drakons: Dragon shifters with dragon blood heritage. Humanoid forms are large with draconic features (horns, wings, scales). Various kinds of Dragons (rare Golden Fire Drakes to common Ground Wyrms).
Drakons: Dragon shifters with dragon blood heritage. Humanoid forms are large with draconic features (horns, wings, scales). Various kinds of Dragons (rare Golden Fire Drakes to common Ground Wyrms).
62.keysRaw: drakons, dragon shifter, dragon shifters, drakon
62.keywordsRaw: drakons, dragon shifter, dragon shifters, drakon

63.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
63.content:
Craesos rule-system: Bonded Riders: Drakons meet riders during Selection ceremony. Riders train at Veilmorian Royal Magical Academy. Bond is innate and similar to a fated mate bond.
Craesos rule-system: Bonded Riders: Drakons meet riders during Selection ceremony. Riders train at Veilmorian Royal Magical Academy. Bond is innate and similar to a fated mate bond.
63.keysRaw: bonded riders, bonded rider, selection ceremony
63.keywordsRaw: bonded riders, bonded rider, selection ceremony

64.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
64.content:
The Crystal Wood: Forest in the Dark Mountains with eternal springtime, colorful crystals, and vibrant jewel-toned leaves.
The Crystal Wood: Forest in the Dark Mountains with eternal springtime, colorful crystals, and vibrant jewel-toned leaves.

65.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
65.content:
Kingdom of Veilmor: Situated in fertile valleys of Craesos. Capital city is Veilgate, home to the Violet Palace.
Kingdom of Veilmor: Situated in fertile valleys of Craesos. Capital city is Veilgate, home to the Violet Palace.
65.keysRaw: kingdom of veilmor, veilgate, veilmor, violet palace
65.keywordsRaw: kingdom of veilmor, veilgate, veilmor, violet palace

66.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
66.content:
Westerly Keep: Massive stone fortress in the center of the Westerly Estate with over a hundred rooms, a ballroom, and an armory.
Westerly Keep: Massive stone fortress in the center of the Westerly Estate with over a hundred rooms, a ballroom, and an armory.

67.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
67.content:
Westerly Estate: Massive, sprawling estate with vineyards, tenant farmers, manor houses for Westerly sons, and rolling fertile hills in Veilmor.
Westerly Estate: Massive, sprawling estate with vineyards, tenant farmers, manor houses for Westerly sons, and rolling fertile hills in Veilmor.

68.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
68.content:
Aulder Wood: Ancient whimsical forest in Wood Elf territory. Features ancient trees and ethereal groves. Borders NE limit of Bulkrag Mountains, shared with Bloodfist and Steeltooth clans.
Aulder Wood: Ancient whimsical forest in Wood Elf territory. Features ancient trees and ethereal groves. Borders NE limit of Bulkrag Mountains, shared with Bloodfist and Steeltooth clans.

69.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
69.content:
Blood Oak: Seat of power for the Bloodfist Clan. Massive Orcish stronghold with stone/timber longhouses surrounded by towering stone walls.
Blood Oak: Seat of power for the Bloodfist Clan. Massive Orcish stronghold with stone/timber longhouses surrounded by towering stone walls.

70.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
70.content:
The Dhovian Pass: Connects the Bulkrag Mountains to the Fangborn Mountains. Encompasses hundreds of square miles of mountainous wilderness. Home to the Dhovia.
The Dhovian Pass: Connects the Bulkrag Mountains to the Fangborn Mountains. Encompasses hundreds of square miles of mountainous wilderness. Home to the Dhovia.

71.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
71.content:
Druvo Ganesemar: Largest Dhovian Druvo within the Dhovian Pass, located on Genese Peak. A terraced village sprawling over the mountainside with over 800 inhabitants. Led by Druvina Beicna.
Druvo Ganesemar: Largest Dhovian Druvo within the Dhovian Pass, located on Genese Peak. A terraced village sprawling over the mountainside with over 800 inhabitants. Led by Druvina Beicna.

72.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
72.content:
Dhovia: Descended from Northern Orcs and Isolai. Impervious to cold, prone to overheating. Have Orcish features (red eyes, pointed ears, tusks), white hair, enormous stature, and blue skin.
Dhovia: Descended from Northern Orcs and Isolai. Impervious to cold, prone to overheating. Have Orcish features (red eyes, pointed ears, tusks), white hair, enormous stature, and blue skin.

73.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
73.content:
Druvo Arozhyr: Family compound where Monvoc was born. Falling into disrepair with many boarded-up Bheruka due to lack of funds and hands.
Druvo Arozhyr: Family compound where Monvoc was born. Falling into disrepair with many boarded-up Bheruka due to lack of funds and hands.

74.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
74.content:
The Council of Sentinels: Made up of the Monarch's six Royal Consorts who enact the Monarch's will in matters of state. Sworn to love and fidelity.
The Council of Sentinels: Made up of the Monarch's six Royal Consorts who enact the Monarch's will in matters of state. Sworn to love and fidelity.
74.keysRaw: the council of sentinels, council of sentinels
74.keywordsRaw: the council of sentinels, council of sentinels

75.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
75.content:
Craesos rule-system: Captain of the Council: Position held by the Monarch's first Consort. Oversees the Council to ensure duties are performed smoothly. All other members are subordinate.
Craesos rule-system: Captain of the Council: Position held by the Monarch's first Consort. Oversees the Council to ensure duties are performed smoothly. All other members are subordinate.

76.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
76.content:
Owl's Perch (Rhys' Tower): A dilapidated lookout Tower deep in the Aulderwood forest where Rhys lives in exile.
Owl's Perch (Rhys' Tower): A dilapidated lookout Tower deep in the Aulderwood forest where Rhys lives in exile.
76.keysRaw: owl's perch (rhys' tower), owl's perch, rhys tower, rhys, owl of the aulderwood
76.keywordsRaw: owl's perch (rhys' tower), owl's perch, rhys tower, rhys, owl of the aulderwood

77.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
77.content:
The Night Guard: The Monarch's personal Royal Guard. Responsible for protecting the Monarch during travel and guarding the Royal wing at all hours. Lieutenant is Sir Marius.
The Night Guard: The Monarch's personal Royal Guard. Responsible for protecting the Monarch during travel and guarding the Royal wing at all hours. Lieutenant is Sir Marius.

78.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
78.content:
Isolai: Largest sub-species of Bear Shifter on Craesos. Abnormally large polar bears, impervious to cold, incredibly strong. Territorial and anti-social, they cohabitate only with Mates and offspring.
Isolai: Largest sub-species of Bear Shifter on Craesos. Abnormally large polar bears, impervious to cold, incredibly strong. Territorial and anti-social, they cohabitate only with Mates and offspring.

81.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
81.content:
Iron Keep, /Jarn-Gildi: war-seat Svartúlfr in Álfar-viðr, con sale sigillate, crimson Seiðr wards e il command table di Eirik.
Iron Keep, /Jarn-Gildi: war-seat Svartúlfr in Álfar-viðr, con sale sigillate, crimson Seiðr wards e il command table di Eirik.

82.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
82.content: Vax: grandi umanoidi demoniaci con aspettativa di vita fino a 180 anni. I Southern Red Vax sono perlopiù spietati trafficanti di schiavi che vivono in caverne sotterranee. I Northern Blue Vax vivono in foreste freddissime, generano alto calore corporeo e credono nei fated mates. Anatomia: corpo massiccio, doppia anatomia riproduttiva con organo primario spesso e organo secondario più lungo, tentacolare, per impregnazione profonda.
82.keysRaw: Vax, Yael, Zeera, Northern Blue Vax, Southern Red Vax, Northern woods, Southern caverns, fated mates
82.keysecondaryRaw: demonic humanoids, slave traders, underground caverns, high body heat, dual anatomy
82.keywordsRaw: Vax, Yael, Zeera, Northern Blue Vax, Southern Red Vax, Northern woods, Southern caverns, fated mates

83.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
83.content: Sarrow: umanoidi-uccello con grandi ali piumate, abitanti delle chiome della Jolnora Forest. Hanno ossa cave, sono fragili e si accoppiano per la vita attraverso preening e doni fatti a mano. I cacciatori Vax spesso li prendono di mira per tagliare e vendere le loro ali.

83.keysecondaryRaw: hollow bones, fragile species, mate for life, preening, handmade gifts

84.name: SvartulfrVerse Entry
84.content: flora/fauna cluster: Kelsis sono umanoidi felini. Suren Beasts sono grandi predatori di branco simili a tigri bianche, mimetizzati nella neve. Asag Beasts hanno folta pelliccia blu, corna nere e artigli affilati; Griven, compagno di Yael, rientra in questo profilo.

85.content:
Jolnora Forest: foresta orientale antica, lussureggiante e tropicale, con alberi giganti e laghi cristallini. È habitat dei Sarrow nelle chiome e contesto per specie e pericoli legati al bestiario.
Jolnora Forest: foresta orientale antica, lussureggiante e tropicale, con alberi giganti e laghi cristallini. È habitat dei Sarrow nelle chiome e contesto per specie e pericoli legati al bestiario.

95.name: TwinXFamily Bot Scenario - Fantasy
95.content: Lo scenario 'TwinXFamily' per il mondo Fantasy prevede: The Royal Council chamber of Svartúlfr Kingdom. Tomorrow is the Amarantia diplomatic summit, and Alyssa (the Kingdom's Princess and Mana Source) is the center of attention. L'Initial Message inizia con le direttive di King Erik e coinvolge l'intero cast principale (Malachia, Noah, Wulfnic, Logan, Jasper/Jorund). La pressione è estrema.
95.keysRaw: TwinXFamily, scenario, King Erik, Royal Guard Malachia
95.keywordsRaw: TwinXFamily, scenario, King Erik, Royal Guard Malachia
